description: Isolated Block Editor maintenance rig. Runs the build and unit test checks used when shaving IBE toward modern Gutenberg APIs. Worktree-friendly: if node_modules is missing, temporarily symlinks the primary checkout's node_modules for the command duration.

check.label: npm run build
check.command: if [ ! -e node_modules ]; then ln -s /var/lib/datamachine/workspace/isolated-block-editor/node_modules node_modules; trap 'rm node_modules' EXIT; fi; npm run build

check.label: npm test -- --runInBand
check.command: if [ ! -e node_modules ]; then ln -s /var/lib/datamachine/workspace/isolated-block-editor/node_modules node_modules; trap 'rm node_modules' EXIT; fi; npm test -- --runInBand
